[Dashboard][General] - Verify navigation menu hierarchy and menu page leading

scenarios.name: [Dashboard] [Wallet login] - Verify that /partner/login is called instead of separate issuer and verifier login APIs
[Dashboard][General] - Verify add domain maximum limit should be 3
[Dashboard][General] - Same domains cannot be added
scenarios.objective:
When a domain (or its wildcard) is already registered by Partner A, it’s 
considered occupied. If Partner B tries to add the same or overlapping 
domain, the system rejects it.

This ensures:

    * One-to-one mapping between domain and partner, avoiding conflicts
      when the domain is allowCrossPartnerAuthentication = true

    * Security and access control, preventing misuse or traffic confusion
      across partners

scenarios.name: [Dashboard][Payout] - Total Earnings
scenarios.precondition: User already earn amount from veifier

scenarios.name: [Dashboard][Payout] - Available for Withdrawal
scenarios.precondition: User already earn amount from veifier
scenarios.objective:
* Definition: The real-time amount currently remaining in the wallet
      that has not been withdrawn and is available to be claimed.

    * Nature: This represents the current balance status.

    * Logic:

          o It decreases when withdrawals are made.

          o Formula: Total Earnings - Total Amount Already Withdrawn = 
            Available for Withdrawal.

          o If a user clicks "Withdraw" and the transaction is successful,
            this figure will be deducted by the corresponding amount, but 
            Total Earnings will remain unchanged.
